query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_CA_NEGLIGENCE', 'Negligence', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Duty, breach, causation, damages.', 'tort,pi'),
('CIV_CA_NEGLIGENCE_PER_SE', 'Negligence Per Se', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Statutory/regulatory violation used to establish breach.', 'tort,pi,statute-based'),
('CIV_CA_PREMISES_LIABILITY', 'Premises Liability', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Specialized negligence pattern for property conditions.', 'pi,property'),
('CIV_CA_PRODUCT_LIABILITY', 'Product Liability (Strict Liability)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Products', 'common_law', NULL, 'Design/manufacture/failure-to-warn theories.', 'products,expert-heavy'),
('CIV_CA_MEDICAL_MALPRACTICE', 'Medical Malpractice', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Professional Negligence', 'common_law', NULL, 'Standard of care + causation; MICRA issues may apply.', 'med-mal,expert-heavy'),
('CIV_CA_WRONGFUL_DEATH', 'Wrongful Death', 'civil', 'CA', 'Personal Injury / Fatality', 'statute', 'Cal. Code Civ. Proc. § 377.60 (framework)', 'Survival action separate; damages categories differ.', 'pi,fatality'),
('CIV_CA_ASSAULT_CIVIL', 'Assault (Civil)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Intentional Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Apprehension of imminent harmful/offensive contact.', 'intentional-tort'),
('CIV_CA_BATTERY_CIVIL', 'Battery (Civil)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Intentional Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Harmful/offensive contact.', 'intentional-tort'),
('CIV_CA_FALSE_IMPRISONMENT_CIVIL', 'False Imprisonment (Civil)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Intentional Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Non-consensual restraint.', 'intentional-tort'),
('CIV_CA_IIED', 'Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress (IIED)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Intentional Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Extreme/outrageous conduct + severe distress + causation.', 'emotional-distress'),
('CIV_CA_NIED', 'Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress (NIED)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Often bystander/direct victim frameworks.', 'emotional-distress'),
('CIV_CA_NEGLIGENT_HIRING', 'Negligent Hiring / Supervision / Retention', 'civil', 'CA', 'Torts', 'common_law', NULL, 'Employer negligence re: employee risk.', 'employment-adjacent,tort');
